title: Digital Twin Cost Comparator
description: Industrial-grade cost comparison tool for digital twin implementations, incorporating ISO 55000, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Digital Twin Scope
inputs.businessContext: Select the scope of the digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and cost multipliers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the scope of the digital twin: asset, process, system, or enterprise. Influences complexity and cost multipliers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital ikizin kapsamını seçin: varlık, süreç, sistem veya kuruluş. Karmaşıklık ve maliyet çarpanlarını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie den Umfang des digitalen Zwillings: Anlage, Prozess, System oder Unternehmen. Beeinflusst Komplexitäts- und Kostenmultiplikatoren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le périmètre du jumeau numérique : actif, processus, système ou entreprise. Influence les multiplicateurs de complexité et de coût.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el alcance del gemelo digital: activo, proceso, sistema o empresa. Influye en los multiplicadores de complejidad y coste.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر نطاق التوأم الرقمي: أصل، عملية، نظام، أو مؤسسة. يؤثر على مضاعفات التعقيد والتكلفة.

inputs.label: Number of Assets/Entities
inputs.businessContext: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of physical assets or entities to be modeled in the digital twin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital ikizde modellenecek toplam fiziksel varlık veya varlık sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der physischen Anlagen oder Entitäten, die im digitalen Zwilling modelliert werden sollen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'actifs physiques ou d'entités à modéliser dans le jumeau numérique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de activos físicos o entidades a modelar en el gemelo digital.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الأصول المادية أو الكيانات المراد نمذجتها في التوأم الرقمي.

inputs.label: Sensor Density (sensors per asset)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of IoT sensors per asset. Higher density increases data acquisition and processing costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of IoT sensors per asset. Higher density increases data acquisition and processing costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varlık başına ortalama IoT sensör sayısı. Yüksek yoğunluk, veri toplama ve işleme maliyetlerini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl von IoT-Sensoren pro Anlage. Höhere Dichte erhöht die Kosten für Datenerfassung und -verarbeitung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de capteurs IoT par actif. Une densité plus élevée augmente les coûts d'acquisition et de traitement des données.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de sensores IoT por activo. Una mayor densidad aumenta los costes de adquisición y procesamiento de datos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط عدد مستشعرات إنترنت الأشياء لكل أصل. تزيد الكثافة العالية من تكاليف اكتساب البيانات ومعالجتها.

inputs.label: Data Acquisition Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (per second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data volume and cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of data collection: 0.1 (every 10s), 1 (per second), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Higher frequency increases data volume and cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri toplama sıklığı: 0.1 (her 10 saniyede bir), 1 (saniyede bir), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Yüksek sıklık, veri hacmini ve maliyeti artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Häufigkeit der Datenerfassung: 0,1 (alle 10 s), 1 (pro Sekunde), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Höhere Frequenz erhöht das Datenvolumen und die Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de collecte des données : 0,1 (toutes les 10 s), 1 (par seconde), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Une fréquence plus élevée augmente le volume de données et le coût.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de recolección de datos: 0.1 (cada 10s), 1 (por segundo), 10 (10 Hz), 100 (100 Hz). Una frecuencia más alta aumenta el volumen de datos y el costo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تردد جمع البيانات: 0.1 (كل 10 ثوانٍ)، 1 (في الثانية)، 10 (10 هرتز)، 100 (100 هرتز). يزيد التردد العالي من حجم البيانات والتكلفة.

inputs.label: Integration Complexity
inputs.businessContext: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Complexity of integrating with existing systems (ERP, MES, CMMS). Low, medium, high. Affects labor and software costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut sistemlerle (ERP, MES, CMMS) entegrasyon karmaşıklığı. Düşük, orta, yüksek. İşçilik ve yazılım maliyetlerini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Komplexität der Integration mit bestehenden Systemen (ERP, MES, CMMS). Niedrig, mittel, hoch. Beeinflusst Arbeits- und Softwarekosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Complexité de l'intégration avec les systèmes existants (ERP, MES, GMAO). Faible, moyenne, élevée. Affecte les coûts de main-d'œuvre et de logiciel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Complejidad de integración con sistemas existentes (ERP, MES, CMMS). Baja, media, alta. Afecta los costos de mano de obra y software.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تعقيد التكامل مع الأنظمة الحالية (ERP، MES، CMMS). منخفض، متوسط، مرتفع. يؤثر على تكاليف العمالة والبرمجيات.

inputs.label: Data Quality Index (DQI)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of data that is accurate, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of data that is accurate, complete, and timely. Based on ISO 8000 data quality standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru, eksiksiz ve zamanında olan veri yüzdesi. ISO 8000 veri kalitesi standartlarına dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Daten, die genau, vollständig und zeitnah sind. Basierend auf ISO-8000-Datenqualitätsstandards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de données exactes, complètes et opportunes. Basé sur les normes de qualité des données ISO 8000.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de datos que son precisos, completos y oportunos. Basado en estándares de calidad de datos ISO 8000.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية للبيانات الدقيقة والكاملة وفي الوقت المناسب. بناءً على معايير جودة البيانات ISO 8000.

inputs.label: Average Labor Rate (USD/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Blended hourly rate for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Blended hourly rate for engineering and IT staff involved in digital twin development and maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital ikiz geliştirme ve bakımında yer alan mühendislik ve BT personeli için harmanlanmış saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemischter Stundensatz für Ingenieur- und IT-Personal, das an der Entwicklung und Wartung des digitalen Zwillings beteiligt ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux horaire mixte pour le personnel d'ingénierie et informatique impliqué dans le développement et la maintenance du jumeau numérique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa mixta por hora para el personal de ingeniería y TI involucrado en el desarrollo y mantenimiento del gemelo digital.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط السعر بالساعة للعاملين في الهندسة وتكنولوجيا المعلومات المشاركين في تطوير وصيانة التوأم الرقمي.

inputs.label: Expected Lifespan (years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational lifespan of the digital twin system. Used for amortization and total cost of ownership calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational lifespan of the digital twin system. Used for amortization and total cost of ownership calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital ikiz sisteminin beklenen operasyonel kullanım ömrü. Amortisman ve toplam sahip olma maliyeti hesaplamaları için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete betriebliche Lebensdauer des digitalen Zwillingssystems. Wird für Abschreibung und Gesamtbetriebskostenberechnungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de vie opérationnelle prévue du système de jumeau numérique. Utilisée pour l'amortissement et le calcul du coût total de possession.
businessContext_i18n.es: Vida útil operativa esperada del sistema de gemelo digital. Se utiliza para cálculos de amortización y costo total de propiedad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمر التشغيلي المتوقع لنظام التوأم الرقمي. يُستخدم للإطفاء وحساب التكلفة الإجمالية للملكية.

rules.message: For asset-level twin, asset count should not exceed 10,000 without enterprise-level scaling.
Combined sensor density and frequency may exceed typical data pipeline capacity. Consider reducing or using edge processing.
Data quality index below 60% may lead to unreliable digital twin outputs. Improve data governance per ISO 8000.
Short lifespan with high asset count may not yield positive ROI. Consider phased implementation.

thresholds.alert: Cost per asset exceeds $5,000. Investigate scope or integration complexity.
Negative net present value. Reassess business case or reduce scope.
Data confidence adjusted score below 0.7. Improve data quality or increase sensor density.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
